title: Manchar Lake Flood Replay
description: Completed flood-extent mission replay using the seeded Pakistan Manchar Lake Sentinel-2 sequence.
task_text: Find new surface water and overflow around Pakistan's Manchar Lake during the 2022 flood sequence.
summary: A compact replay showing raw flood imagery staying local while a single water-extent alert is pushed as downlink-ready JSON.

alerts.timelapse_analysis: The seeded Sentinel-2 sequence shows Manchar Lake and adjacent floodplain water expansion through the 2022 flood window, then persistence into later frames.
alerts.analysis_summary: The replay isolates a flood extent candidate: raw frames remain local, while the mission downlinks compact water-extent evidence JSON.
alerts.satellite_note: Orbital triage detected persistent surface-water expansion around the lake boundary and requested ground validation.
alerts.ground_note: Ground review confirms the flood extent replay is suitable as a payload-reduction training sample.
alerts.ground_action: CONFIRM — flood overflow evidence is downlink-ready as compact water-extent JSON.
findings: Surface water expands beyond the normal lake boundary
Floodwater remains visible across multiple contextual frames
